summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 安全需求強勁與防火牆更新週期，Palo Alto Networks 獲得多家華爾街投行調升目標價，市場動能極為強勁。

bullish.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Palo Alto Networks, Raises Price Target to $285
bullish.reason: 知名投行 Wells Fargo 維持增持評級並大幅調升目標價至 285 美元，顯示對公司長期成長潛力的強烈信心。

bullish.title: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Up 8.3% After Launching Idira Identity Platform
bullish.reason: 推出 Idira 身分安全平台，整合了發現、控制與治理功能，進一步擴大產品生態系，市場反應正面。

bullish.title: Stifel Maintains Buy on Palo Alto Networks, Raises Price Target to $275
bullish.reason: Stifel 將目標價從 185 美元大幅調升至 275 美元，反映出對公司基本面動能的重新評估。

bullish.title: Palo Alto Networks customers show confidence in AI security strategy at Ignite On Tour event, Jefferies says
bullish.reason: 客戶在 Ignite On Tour 活動中展現對 AI 安全策略的高度興趣，驗證了公司在 AI 安全領域的市場領導地位。

bullish.title: Insiders of Palo Alto Networks Getting Good Value On Their US$10.00m Investment
bullish.reason: 內部人士在過去 12 個月內投入 1,000 萬美元增持股份，顯示管理層對公司未來股價表現具備信心。

bearish.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Palo Alto Networks (PANW) After Its Recent 44% Surge
bearish.reason: 股價近期漲幅達 44%，引發市場對於估值是否過高、是否已「定價完美」的擔憂。

bearish.title: Palo Alto Networks Up 70%: Can the Rally Last Into June?
bearish.reason: 指出股價漲幅已達 70%，技術面呈現超買狀態，短期內可能面臨獲利回吐壓力。

neutral.title: Fortinet vs. Palo Alto Networks: What Do Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors?
neutral.reason: 對比兩家資安大廠的營收趨勢，屬於中性的產業比較分析，未對 PANW 股價產生直接影響。

neutral.title: Palo Alto Networks Is Beating Palantir by 60% This Year. Is a Rebalancing Imminent?
neutral.reason: 探討投資組合再平衡的可能性，屬於投資策略討論，非針對公司基本面變化的分析。
